name: Wire Instagram Business account to the Building Shultz FB page
description: Sam queue job — after Jed has linked the IG Business account in Meta Business Suite, Sam validates the FB page can see the IG account ID, persists IG_BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID in .env, and confirms cross-posting now reaches Instagram automatically.
trigger_examples: instagram is linked now, finish the wiring
ig business account is connected — wire it up
prompt_template: Sam: hit Graph API /{{fb_page_id}}?fields=instagram_business_account with FB_BUILDING_SHULTZ_TOKEN. If instagram_business_account.id is returned, append IG_BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID to .env, restart solomon-v4 --update-env, and run a test cross-post in shadow mode. If the field is absent, tell Jed the linkage hasn't propagated and to wait 5 min and retry.
escalation_conditions: IG account not linked — escalate to Jed with link to Meta Business Suite instructions

smoke_test.trigger_message: instagram is hooked up now finish the integration

notes: Once wired, solomon_cross_post stops handing back IG and auto-posts via the existing social_post tool's instagram branch.
